title: Indulgent Earthy Saudi-Arabian Vanilla Tagine
description: A rich and comforting Saudi-Arabian dessert featuring the earthy flavors of dates and the sweetness of vanilla, all in a warm and aromatic tagine.
instructions: Combine the dates, vanilla pods, cardamom pods, cinnamon sticks, and star anise in a large bowl.
Add the coconut milk, ghee or vegan ghee alternative, and rose water to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Heat a large clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the almond mixture to the tagine and cook for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Remove the tagine from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Strain the liquid from the tagine into a saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes or until the liquid has thickened slightly.
Serve the tagine warm, garnished with chopped almonds and a drizzle of honey or maple syrup.
